purpose: Own small runtime contracts and pure tuning helpers for the public Graph entrypoint.
invariants: Do not move GPU pass ownership or shader behavior into this shell.
Public Graph API compatibility remains in src/index.ts.
Helpers here are pure constants, types, device setup, or stateless data builders.
change_protocols: Changing exported contracts requires checking src/index.ts re-exports.
Changing tuning constants requires comparing simulation and camera behavior.
